heading: Allocation of resources by the Secretary
label: 217 Allocation of resources by the Secretary
notes: References in TextThe effective date of this chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), is 60 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Nov. 25, 2002section 4 of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that adequate staffing is provided to assure that levels of customs revenue services provided on the day before the effective date of this chapter shall continue to be provided.
result in any significant reduction in customs revenue services, including hours of operation, provided at any office within the Department or any port of entry;
eliminate or relocate any office of the Department which provides customs revenue services; or

children.heading: Definition
children.label: c Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “customs revenue services” means those customs revenue functions described in paragraphs (1) through (6) and paragraph (8) of .section 215 of this title
